evidence_boundary.en: This page is limited to reviewed identity, life-date, and official object records; it does not prove contact, influence, instruction, migration, cultural identity, or rank.

en: Begin with titles and dates, then compare materials and holding institutions.
Which details recur, and which details change?
zh-Hans: 先从标题和年代开始，再比较材料与收藏机构。
哪些细节反复出现，哪些地方发生了变化？

public_intro.en: Robert Delaunay (1885–1941) was an artist associated in these museum entries with europe and practices such as printmaking, painting, drawing. The selection brings together 15 works. Begin with titles, dates, materials, and holding institutions, then compare what recurs and what changes across the works; these pages do not include local images.
public_intro.zh-Hans: Robert Delaunay（1885—1941）是一位与europe相关的艺术家，作品中可见printmaking, painting, drawing等实践。这里选取15件作品；请从标题、年代和材料开始，寻找反复出现与发生变化的细节，页面暂不展示本地图像。

labels.en: ...tiens, lá, au coin de pont Álexándre, hier soir, j'ai attendu papa pendant une heure. Sais-tu ce que j'ai fait? Eh bien, avec mon couteau, j'ai gravé le nom de Guynemer dans le parapet. Et puis profound, tu sais!... (...look, there, at the corner of Alexander bridge, I wanted for papa for an hour. Do you know what I did? Well, with my knife I engraved the name Guynemer on the parapet. And very deeply, you know!...) (plate, facing page 274) from La Relêve du matin (The Morning Relief Troops)
